mapper.select:
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM sys_campus WHERE is_deleted = 0
AND (campus_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR campus_code LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%'))
SELECT campus_id AS campusId, campus_name AS campusName, campus_code AS campusCode, sort_order AS sortOrder FROM sys_campus WHERE is_deleted = 0 ORDER BY sort_order ASC, campus_id ASC
